title: 5000-S5 Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants (for all) - Canada.ca
content:
## 5000-S5 Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants (for all)
For best results, download and open this form in Adobe Reader . See General information for details.
You can view this form in:
- PDF fillable/saveable 5000-s5-fill-25e.pdf
For people with visual impairments, the following alternate formats are also available:
- E-text 5000-s5-25e.txt
- Large print 5000-s5-lp-25e.pdf
Last update: 2026-01-20
Previous-year versions are also available.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
